title: specgen/generate: Factor out setting resource limits from CompleteSpec
body:
This avoids setting values in the spec which are not supported on FreeBSD - including these values causes warning messages for the unsupported features.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

Signed-off-by: Doug Rabson <dfr@rabson.org>

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
